sentences.arabic: وَصَلَ وَزِيرُ الْخَارِجِيَّةِ إِلَى الْعَاصِمَةِ لِعَقْدِ اجْتِمَاعٍ مُهِمٍّ مَعَ الْمَسْؤُولِينَ.
sentences.translation: Ministar vanjskih poslova doputovao je u glavni grad kako bi održao važan sastanak sa zvaničnicima.
sentences.translationEn: The Foreign Minister arrived in the capital to hold an important meeting with officials.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلَ الِاجْتِمَاعُ تَعْزِيزَ التَّعَاوُنِ بَيْنَ الْبَلَدَيْنِ فِي مَجَالِ التِّجَارَةِ.
sentences.translation: Na sastanku je bilo riječi o jačanju saradnje dvije zemlje u oblasti trgovine.
sentences.translationEn: The meeting addressed strengthening cooperation between the two countries in the field of trade.

sentences.arabic: أَكَّدَ الطَّرَفَانِ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ السَّلَامِ وَالِاسْتِقْرَارِ فِي الْمِنْطَقَةِ.
sentences.translation: Obje strane su naglasile važnost mira i stabilnosti u regiji.
sentences.translationEn: Both sides emphasized the importance of peace and stability in the region.

sentences.arabic: كَمَا تَمَّ التَّوْقِيعُ عَلَى اتِّفَاقِيَّةٍ جَدِيدَةٍ لِتَسْهِيلِ حَرَكَةِ الْمُسَافِرِينَ.
sentences.translation: Potpisan je i novi sporazum o olakšavanju kretanja putnika.
sentences.translationEn: A new agreement was also signed to facilitate the movement of travelers.

sentences.arabic: يَعْكِسُ هَذَا اللِّقَاءُ الرَّغْبَةَ الْقَوِيَّةَ فِي بِنَاءِ عَلَاقَاتٍ مَتِينَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj susret odražava snažnu želju za izgradnjom čvrstih odnosa.
sentences.translationEn: This meeting reflects the strong desire to build solid relations.
